mapper.insert: INSERT INTO routing.routing_registry ( org_key, org_name, my_domain, target_schema, target_table, instance_name, org_type, is_sandbox, selected_object, object_label, routing_protocol, routing_endpoint, routing_status, source_status, initial_load_count, last_error_message, activated_at, released_at, last_synced_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{orgKey}, #{orgName}, #{myDomain}, #{targetSchema}, #{targetTable}, #{instanceName}, #{orgType}, #{sandbox}, #{selectedObject}, #{objectLabel}, #{routingProtocol}, #{routingEndpoint}, #{routingStatus}, #{sourceStatus}, #{initialLoadCount}, #{lastErrorMessage}, COALESCE(#{activatedAt}, NOW()), #{releasedAt}, COALESCE(#{lastSyncedAt}, NOW()), #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE org_name = VALUES(org_name), my_domain = VALUES(my_domain), target_schema = VALUES(target_schema), target_table = VALUES(target_table), instance_name = VALUES(instance_name), org_type = VALUES(org_type), is_sandbox = VALUES(is_sandbox), object_label = VALUES(object_label), routing_endpoint = VALUES(routing_endpoint), routing_status = VALUES(routing_status), source_status = VALUES(source_status), initial_load_count = VALUES(initial_load_count), last_error_message = VALUES(last_error_message), released_at = VALUES(released_at), last_synced_at = VALUES(last_synced_at), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO routing.routing_history ( routing_registry_id, org_key, selected_object, routing_protocol, event_type, event_status, event_stage, endpoint, message, detail_text, initial_load_count, actor, created_at ) VALUES ( #{routingRegistryId}, #{orgKey}, #{selectedObject}, #{routingProtocol}, #{eventType}, #{eventStatus}, #{eventStage}, #{endpoint}, #{message}, #{detailText}, #{initialLoadCount}, #{actor}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT org_key AS orgKey, org_name AS orgName, my_domain AS myDomain, target_schema AS targetSchema, target_table AS targetTable, object_label AS objectLabel, selected_object AS objectName, routing_protocol AS protocol, routing_endpoint AS endpoint, routing_status AS routingStatus, source_status AS sourceStatus, initial_load_count AS initialLoadCount, last_error_message AS lastErrorMessage, last_synced_at AS lastSyncedAt, activated_at AS activatedAt, released_at AS releasedAt, is_sandbox AS isSandbox, instance_name AS instanceName, org_type AS orgType FROM routing.routing_registry WHERE routing_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY org_name, selected_object ASC, routing_protocol DESC

SELECT org_key AS orgKey, org_name AS orgName, my_domain AS myDomain, target_schema AS targetSchema, target_table AS targetTable, object_label AS objectLabel, selected_object AS objectName, routing_protocol AS protocol, routing_endpoint AS endpoint, routing_status AS routingStatus, source_status AS sourceStatus, initial_load_count AS initialLoadCount, last_error_message AS lastErrorMessage, last_synced_at AS lastSyncedAt, activated_at AS activatedAt, released_at AS releasedAt, is_sandbox AS isSandbox, instance_name AS instanceName, org_type AS orgType FROM routing.routing_registry WHERE routing_status = 'ACTIVE' AND org_key = #{orgKey} ORDER BY selected_object ASC, routing_protocol DESC

SELECT org_key AS orgKey, MAX(org_name) AS orgName, MAX(instance_name) AS instanceName, MAX(org_type) AS orgType, MAX(is_sandbox) AS isSandbox, MAX(my_domain) AS myDomain FROM routing.routing_registry WHERE routing_status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY org_key ORDER BY MAX(org_name)

SELECT org_key AS orgKey, MAX(org_name) AS orgName, MAX(instance_name) AS instanceName, MAX(org_type) AS orgType, MAX(is_sandbox) AS isSandbox, MAX(my_domain) AS myDomain FROM routing.routing_registry WHERE routing_status = 'ACTIVE' AND org_key = #{orgKey} GROUP BY org_key
mapper.update: UPDATE routing.routing_registry SET routing_status = 'RELEASED', source_status = 'INACTIVE', last_error_message = #{message}, released_at = NOW(), last_synced_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE org_key = #{orgKey} AND selected_object = #{selectedObject} AND routing_protocol = #{routingProtocol}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM routing.ingestion_slot_registry WHERE is_active = TRUE AND routing_protocol = #{routingProtocol}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO routing.ingestion_slot_registry ( org_key, selected_object, routing_protocol, routing_registry_id, is_active, activated_at, deactivated_at, note, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{orgKey}, #{selectedObject}, #{routingProtocol}, #{routingRegistryId}, TRUE, NOW(), NULL, #{note}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE routing_protocol = VALUES(routing_protocol), routing_registry_id = VALUES(routing_registry_id), is_active = TRUE, deactivated_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW(), note = VALUES(note)
mapper.select: SELECT id, org_key AS orgKey, selected_object AS selectedObject, routing_protocol AS routingProtocol, routing_registry_id AS routingRegistryId, is_active AS isActive, activated_at AS activatedAt, deactivated_at AS deactivatedAt, note, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM routing.ingestion_slot_registry WHERE is_active = TRUE AND routing_protocol = #{routingProtocol} AND org_key = #{orgKey}
